title: Skill Manifest
description: Schema for a0 agent skill.json manifest files

subModules.description: List of sub-component directories to auto-load

tools.description: Tool definitions provided by this skill

args.description: Documentation for CLI arguments accepted by this skill. Passed via --skill-arg=<name>=<value> at runtime.

prompts.description: Prompt definitions provided by this skill

SkillTool.description: A tool definition — either a system (C++ handler) tool or a command-based subprocess tool

name.description: Unique tool name within the component

description.description: Human-readable description of what the tool does

command.description: Shell command to execute (required for command-based tools)

inputMode.description: How parameters are passed to the command: stdin (pipe as JSON) or args (CLI arguments)

dockerImage.description: Docker image for containerized execution (e.g. ubuntu:22.04)

useContainerPool.description: Whether to use shared container pool (false = ephemeral docker run --rm)

aptDependencies.description: APT packages to install inside the container

systemTool.description: True if implemented as a C++ handler, false if a subprocess command

default.description: Include in LLM anchor schema (default tools)

parameters.description: JSON Schema object for LLM function-calling parameters

subCommand.description: Override for hyphenated CLI subcommands (e.g. rev-parse for tool rev_parse)

streaming.description: Tool supports streaming output via StreamHandle/StreamCallback

SkillPrompt.description: A prompt-based capability within a skill package

name.description: Unique prompt name within the component

description.description: Human-readable description of what the prompt does

promptFile.description: Path to the prompt markdown file (relative to skill.json directory)

prompt.description: Inline prompt text (used when promptFile is absent)

chain.description: Parent/base prompt names to chain this prompt on

dependencies.description: Qualified tool/prompt names required by this prompt

parallelValidators.description: Run validators in parallel (independent) or sequentially (default)

SkillArg.description: A CLI argument that this skill accepts. The name is relative to the skill; at runtime it is prefixed by the skill name (e.g. skill 'playwright' with arg 'headless' becomes --skill-arg=playwright-headless).

name.description: Argument name, used as the key in --skill-arg=<name>=<value>

toolName.description: Name of the validator tool to run
